zh.lifeSummary: 當Phillipa Jonson於1610年4月29日出生在英國英格蘭戴文蕾托 托林頓時，她的父親William Jonson32歲，母親Joanna Tayler30歲。她於1626年7月12日與Thomas Webber在英國戴文艾可謝特結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於大約1650年在英國英格蘭戴文比德福德享年41歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭戴文比德福德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Phillipa Jonson于1610年4月29日出生在英国英格兰戴文蕾托 托林頓时，她的父亲William Jonson32岁，母亲Joanna Tayler30岁。她于1626年7月12日与Thomas Webber在英国戴文艾可謝特结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于大约1650年在英国英格兰戴文比德福德享年41岁，埋葬在英国英格兰戴文比德福德。

nameMeanings.name: Jonson
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Scandinavian Erik, Lars, Sven.
English and Welsh: variant of   Johnson  .
Americanized form (and a rare Swedish variant) of Swedish   Jonsson  .

variants.name: Johnson
meanings: English and Scottish: patronymic from the Middle English and Older Scots personal name Johan, Jo(h)n (see John ) + -son. It was often interchanged with Jenson and Janson . In North America, this surname has absorbed cognates from other languages, e.g. Norwegian, Danish, or North German Johnsen , Johannesen , Johannsen , Johansen , Jansen , Jantzen , and Jensen , Swedish Johnsson (see below), Johansson , Jonsson , and Jansson , Dutch Janssen , German Janz , Czech Jansa 1, and Slovenian Janša (see Jansa 2) and Janežič (see Janezic ). Johnson (including in the sense 2 below) is the second most frequent surname in the US. It is also the second most common surname among Native Americans and a very common surname among African Americans.
Americanized form (and a less common Swedish variant) of Swedish Johnsson: patronymic from the personal name John, a variant of Jon (see John ). Compare 1 above.

History: Surname Johnson was brought independently to North America by many different bearers from the 17th and 18th centuries onward. Andrew Johnson (1808–75), 17th president of the US, was born in Raleigh, NC, the younger son of Jacob Johnson and Mary (or Polly) McDonough. Little is known of his ancestors. The 36th president, Lyndon B. Johnson, dates his American forebears back seven generations to James Johnston (sic) (born c. 1662) who lived at Currowaugh, Nansemond, and Isle of Wight counties, VA. — Noted early bearers also include Marmaduke Johnson (died 1674), a printer who came from England to MA in 1660; Edward Johnson (1598–1672), a colonial chronicler who was baptized at St. George's parish, Canterbury, England, and emigrated to Boston in 1630; and Sir Nathaniel Johnson (c. 1645–1713), a colonial governor of Carolina, who came from County Durham, England.

nameMeanings.name: Phillipa
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Variant of Phyllis , derived from the genitive case (Greek Phyllidos, Latin Phyllidis) with the addition of the Latin feminine ending -a.

en.lifeSummary: When Phillipa Jonson was born on 29 April 1610, in Little Torrington, Devon, England, United Kingdom, her father, William Jonson, was 32 and her mother, Joanna Tayler, was 30. She married Thomas Webber on 12 July 1626, in Exeter, Devon, England. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 2 daughters. She died about 1650, in Bideford, Devon, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 41, and was buried in Bideford, Devon, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Phillipa Jonson est née le 29 avril 1610, à Little Torrington, Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, William Jonson, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Joanna Tayler, avait 30 ans. Elle a épousé Thomas Webber le 12 juillet 1626, à Exeter, Devon, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée environ 1650, à Bideford, Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 41 ans, et a été enterrée à Bideford, Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Phillipa Jonson am 29. April 1610 in Little Torrington, Devon, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater William Jonson 32 und ihre Mutter Joanna Tayler 30. Sie hat am 12. Juli 1626 in Exeter, Devon, England Thomas Webber geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb um 1650 im Alter von 41 Jahren in Bideford, Devon, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Bideford, Devon, England, United Kingdom begraben.

ko.Church of Saint Giles, Little Torrington: 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 리틀 토링턴 스트 길스' c후르치
ko.lifeSummary: Phillipa Jonson(이)가 1610년 4월 29일 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 리틀 토링턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William Jonson(은)는 32세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Joanna Tayler(은)는 30세였다. 그녀는 1626년 7월 12일 영국 데폰 세터에서 Thomas Webber(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1650년 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 비데퍼드에서 41세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 비데퍼드에 묻혔다.

Ela casou-se com Thomas Webber em 12 de julho de 1626, em Exeter, Devon, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 2 filhas. ru.Church of Saint Giles, Little Torrington: ст джилес' чурч, литл торрингтон, девон, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Phillipa Jonson родилась 29 апреля 1610 г. в местности литл торрингтон, девон, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени William Jonson было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Joanna Tayler, 30. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Thomas Webber 12 июля 1626 г. в местности эксетир, девон, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 2 дочери. Она умерла около 1650 г. в местности бидефорд, девон, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 41 год и была похоронена в местности бидефорд, девон, Англия, Великобритания.

Se casó con Thomas Webber el 12 de julio de 1626, en Exeter, Devon, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió aproximadamente 1650, en Bideford, Devon, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 41 años, y fue sepultada en Bideford, Devon, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
